Download PDF ↓

Terrence Gillespie

Principal Design Engineer / Brisbane

Dear AlphaSense Design Team,

AlphaSense is building the thing I reach for in my own work: trustworthy answers pulled from impossible volumes of content, fast enough to act on. The Principal Design Engineer role — design, engineering, and product strategy in one seat, defining how AI shows up in real workflows from search to synthesis to decision — is exactly the work I do now and want to do at this scale. I prototype interfaces in HTML/CSS/JS, iterate them against the model, and ship the patterns to engineering. That loop is how I think.

I'm Principal Design Engineer at Westpac, one of Australia's four major banks, where I'm custodian of the native design system across iOS, Android, macOS, and watchOS for 4 million daily users. It's a complex, high-stakes, data-rich domain — payments, identity, fraud — and it ships fast. I led the design of SafeCall and SafeBlock, scam-prevention features that protect customers at the moment they're being defrauded, and the design integration of an acquired personal finance app: spending insights, charting, and budgeting at banking scale. The app has been rated #1 in Australia by Forrester three years running, and #1 for access and inclusion by the Australian Disability Network. I treat the design system as product infrastructure — tokens, components, and the scalable patterns that let teams move fast without losing craft.

Building AI and agentic experiences is my daily work, with the tools your team uses — Claude Code, MCP, and Skills. I take a data-rich problem to a coded prototype in HTML/CSS/JS, refine it against the model, and hand engineering a working reference instead of a static mockup. For a search-to-synthesis surface, that means proving the interaction model in code before a sprint is spent building it.

I've shipped production work this way for over fifteen years across studio, telco, and banking. I lead a senior design team, drive technical and design decisions across product and engineering, mentor designers and engineers, and present the annual design review to 4,000 engineers at TechX.

I'm ready to relocate to New York, or to work across timezones with your global team. My portfolio is at terrygillespie.com/product-designer. Thank you for considering me.

Terrence Gillespie
